cleavage agent: Protein digestion was achieved with 2.5 μg of trypsin (Promega)
collision energy: analytes with charge states 2–7 were selected for fragmentation with normalized collision energy of 28%
enrichment method: Enrichment of crosslinked peptides was done with self-packed TiO2 spin columns
instrument: Eluting peptides were analyzed with Orbitrap Exploris 480 (Thermo Fischer Scientific)
labeling: the reads obtained from RNA sequencing were processed and analyzed using Geneious Prime software
